channel.title: PBSA Security on The Security Gazette
channel.description: Recent content in PBSA Security on The Security Gazette

item.title: CCTV for Student Accommodation — Safety and Privacy Guide UK 2026
item.description: Essential guidance for PBSA providers and university halls: CCTV in communal areas, ANUK/Unipol compliance, resident privacy rights, and best practice for student safety.
